playbook.intent: A weekly call across teams (P4 across vendors / client side; P6 across squads): align on handoffs, surface late commitments, and lock the next-week handoff schedule.
playbook.scope: A weekly call across teams (P4 across vendors / client side; P6 across squads): align on handoffs, surface late commitments, and lock the next-week handoff schedule.

success-criteria.criterion: Pre-pulled commitments + aging view on screen
Every late item has recovery owner + date
Every above-threshold dependency has an escalation decision

stage.name: Pre-pull commitments
stage.intent: Walk in with the data, not the discussion.

tasks.task: Pull every team's commitments from last week and next week

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the data is on screen before the call starts.

stage.name: Open with the late list

tasks.task: Show the late list with team + item + days late
Ask each team owner for a recovery plan
Cap the time per item to keep the call moving

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every late item has a recovery owner and date.

stage.name: Lock next-week handoffs

tasks.task: Walk next week's planned handoffs by date
Confirm each handoff with both sides

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every next-week handoff is double-confirmed.

stage.name: Risk + escalation

tasks.task: Flag dependencies above the slack threshold
Decide which need escalation outside the call

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every above-threshold dependency has an escalation decision.

stage.name: Broadcast
stage.intent: Send the schedule + recoveries to all involved.

tasks.task: Post the next-week handoff schedule to the program channel
Notify each recovery owner with their commitment
Log the escalations into the program risk register

stage.decision-gate: Required: handoff schedule broadcast within 60 minutes of call end.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content run-a-30-minute-cross-team-dependency-call --format md, agent: faion get-content run-a-30-minute-cross-team-dependency-call --format context, json: faion get-content run-a-30-minute-cross-team-dependency-call --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
